violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean top and sides of microwave.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Floors are rusty in walk in cooler.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor edges in kitchen and back room need cleaned.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean rack under warmer and cup rack. -Clean under counter equipment.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors in backroom and in walk in cooler need cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Floors in walk in cooler are rusty.
